name: react-query
summary: Hooks for managing, caching and syncing asynchronous and remote data in React

story.problem:
You're looking at the v3 version of react-query. Starting with v4, react-query is now available as @tanstack/react-query

Find the docs at https://tanstack.com/query/latest
story.when_to_use: Use react-query when you need hooks for managing, caching and syncing asynchronous and remote data in react.
